title: bdlib
description: This is a collection of generic code used by my other mods.
body:
Currently used by the following mods:

* [Advanced Generators](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-generators)
* [Factorium](https://modrinth.com/mod/factorium)
* Technobauble
* Compacter
* Proxy

Requires [Scalable Cats Force](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalable-cats-force) to run.

### Open Source

The mod is licensed under the [MIT License](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT), the source code is available on [GitHub](https://github.com/bdew-minecraft/generators).

Yes this means you have permission to add it to any public or private mod pack.
